November 6 - Day 5

Japan Trip Itinerary

Published

Invalid Date

November 6 - Day 5

Location: Tokyo

Meals Included: Dinner included

Today’s Activities

  • Lunch on your own
  • Sashiko Museum
  • Overnight at Hotel Regina Lake Kawaguchi
